title: stevia phlebophylla
intro: Stevia phlebophylla, also known as Stevia phlebophylla, is a plant species within the genus Stevia, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. Stevia phlebophylla offers various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
